title: Program closeout and deprecation documentation
objective: Archive the SimplyClik Modernization Program tracker, execute Firebase decommission, and publish final handoff documentation.
trigger: Initiated after W7-03 verification report signed off (all gates G1-G5 passed).

W0_program_setup.notes: All W0 deliverables complete; tracker operational throughout program

blocked: W1-03 data integrity hardening (platform-api workspace inaccessible)
W1-05 OpenAPI contract alignment (depends on W1-04)
W1_platform_api.closeout_action: W1-03, W1-04, W1-05 deferred to post-program backlog; document in handoff

W2_database_migrations.notes: All W2 migration reliability tasks complete

firebase_decommission_sequence.prerequisite: W7-03 all gates G1-G5 signed off; Firebase traffic at zero for >= 24h

steps.action: Disable all Firebase feature flags across all surfaces
steps.detail: Set all ff.*.api_* flags to permanent-on, disable Firebase fallback code paths
Export full Firestore database via gcloud firestore export to Cloud Storage; retain for 90 days minimum
Set all functions to minimum replicas 0 or delete; verify invocation count = 0 after 24h

steps.action: Remove Firebase SDKs from client codebases
steps.detail: Create cleanup PRs for Android, iOS, web-admin, web-portal removing firebase-* dependencies behind decommission flag; merge after 14-day stability window
steps.note: Do not remove until rollback switches unused for 14 consecutive days (per W4-05 Phase 3 exit criteria)

steps.detail: Migrate remaining Firebase Auth users to Supabase Auth if applicable; disable Firebase Auth provider; update client auth initialization
steps.note: Highest-risk step — coordinate with all surface leads; requires coordinated release

steps.detail: Downgrade Firebase project to Spark plan (free tier) or close project after 90-day data retention window

tracker.action: Mark all completed tasks as done; export final tasks.json snapshot

artifacts.action: Copy all program artifacts to long-term storage location

migration_scripts.action: Merge PR #8; tag release in SimplyClik repo as v1.0.0-migration

runbooks.action: Publish W6-03 incident runbook and W6-04 secrets rotation playbook to team wiki

platform_api_backlog: W1-03: Data integrity hardening (requires platform-api source workspace access)
W1-04: Authorization matrix and negative-path tests (same prerequisite)
W1-05: OpenAPI contract alignment (depends on W1-04)
Firebase Auth migration to Supabase Auth (not in scope for this program)
ongoing_operations: Monthly secrets rotation per W6-04 playbook
Weekly metrics review against W6-02 baselines
Annual decommission archive review (90-day Firebase data retention)

final_sign_off_checklist: W7-03 all verification gates G1-G5 signed off
Firebase Firestore and Functions at zero traffic for >= 24h
All program artifacts committed to version control
Post-migration backlog documented and handed off to engineering team
Incident runbook and secrets rotation playbook published to team wiki
